{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description= This Snail Shell is known for its large round saw. Even the Snail that wears it is a little scared, Some of the wiser Snail use it in place of air conditioning.
|affct=TECH
|hard=ATK
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=4207
|relic1=Guillotine
|relic2=Tetromino
|relic3=Linde's Fridge
|relic4=Watt Steam Engine
|relic5=Leo's Plant
}}
|color=blue
|earth=3
|water=3
|fire=4
|wind=4
|form=Mecha
|element=Water
|realm=Bharata
|orangehard=DEF
}}
